prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.2 kg; Height 168.8 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 253mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 199mg/dL; 3 months ago 200mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.1kg; 9 months ago 71.1kg; 6 months ago 71.8kg; 3 months ago 70.7kg; current 71.2kg), Height (12 months ago 168.8cm; 9 months ago 168.8cm; 6 months ago 168.8cm; 3 months ago 168.8cm; current 168.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 63U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 55U/L), AST (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 44U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 62mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 62mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 63mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 62mL/min/1.73m²; current 63mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 91mg/g; 9 months ago 95mg/g; 6 months ago 94mg/g; 3 months ago 96mg/g; current 80mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 14.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
